pr.description: Pull-request blocking profile. Only baseline probes required on every verified PR run.

cloud-surface.description: PR policy records the narrow ResponseAPI promotion boundary without blocking routine refactors on response probes.
deferredRisks: Response API stream promotion still depends on a separate tracked decision and nightly evidence.

node-integrations.description: PR policy records MCP interop evidence boundaries without blocking on host-level interop yet.
deferredRisks: Server-initiated notifications and list_changed updates are still covered by unit tests, not live verification.
OAuth discovery covers metadata endpoints only; token acquisition flows remain out of scope for this package.
HTTP interop evidence is collected per server; multi-server routing remains a higher-level integration concern.

nightly.description: Nightly profile. Requires the broader live-evidence set for surfaces already productized in Phase 1.

cloud-surface.description: Nightly policy keeps ResponseAPI promotion scoped to the narrowest live-backed contract.
deferredRisks: Higher-level ResponseAPI helper variants remain provider-only until a separate promotion package narrows their contract.

node-integrations.description: Nightly policy requires transport-level MCP interop evidence while holding host-level interop at beta until a later promotion package approves stricter gating.
deferredRisks: Server-initiated notifications and list_changed updates are still covered by unit tests, not live verification.
OAuth discovery covers metadata endpoints only; token acquisition flows remain out of scope for this package.
HTTP interop evidence is collected per server; multi-server routing remains a higher-level integration concern.
